title: Shable's Create Scannable
description: Create like textures for the Scannable mod
body:
Did this to my personal modpack so it would fit better than the regular Scannable textures



Requires [Scannable](https://modrinth.com/mod/scannable);


**Can i use this in my modpack?** Of course! Just credit me please!

**Can you update/backport to X version?** I might do that if i find the time to do it, so no need to ask for it, it'll happen when it happen!
